requirements: Plot all three centered five-year rolling anomaly series.
Use distinct CVD-safe categorical colours plus distinct line styles.
Add a gray dashed zero-anomaly reference line.
Use a frameless legend and label the anomaly in degrees Celsius.
Keep the supplied ascending order.
Use a CVD-safe sequential treatment.
Directly label every bar with its percentage.
Format the value axis as percentages and retain only the bottom value spine and ticks.
Draw one box plot per species in the supplied category order.
Overlay all observations with light deterministic horizontal jitter.
Use CVD-safe categorical colours without relying on colour for group identity.
Label body mass in grams and keep overplotting subordinate to the boxes.
Preserve the supplied row and column order.
Use a continuous, CVD-safe, perceptually uniform diverging colormap centered at zero.
Include a labeled colour bar spanning -1 to 1.
Separate cells visually and remove all plot spines and tick marks while keeping labels.
Plot vehicle weight against fuel economy with no fitted line.
Encode USA, Europe, and Japan with both CVD-safe categorical colours and distinct marker shapes.
Use print-scale markers and a frameless non-overlapping legend.
Label weight in pounds and fuel economy in miles per gallon.
Use 0.1-magnitude bins beginning at 5.0 and covering the observed maximum.
Normalize bar heights to percentage of all supplied events.
Use a CVD-safe sequential or single-hue treatment.
Format the y axis as percentages and label magnitude without implying one uniform magnitude type.
